sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111250" key="filo/krotos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλό-κροτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111250.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving noise,</tr_> of Pan, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg019.perseus-grc1:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Pan.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
